text.title: mr-slash-command-surface Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for mr-slash-command-surface as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Letting the bot rewrite the entire PR body on every `/describe` re-run.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Human-edited reviewer notes are erased; reviewers stop adding context because it disappears.
